programs.title: Yum and Yummer
programs.desc: There's not much more to miss than college football, parties, and the food; no matter the time, day or night, you can always find some of the best bites around to satisfy campus cravings.

programs.title: Yum and Yummer
programs.desc: A day's worth of foods that are jam-packed, crammed full and superstuffed with the tastiest, most delicious flavors imaginable; these aren't just everyday delicacies -- to make this list, foods have to be brimming with the biggest flavors.

programs.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programs.desc: BBQ fried chicken; hot dog with 50 topping choices; apple pie smothered in caramel.

programs.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programs.desc: Fruit-filled homemade breakfast pastry; peanut butter and jelly doughnuts; chocolate mousse; tangerine creamsicles.

programs.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
The Best Thing I Ever Ate
programs.desc: Wolfgang Puck picks a perfect fruit-and-cream pie in Los Angeles; in New York, Anne Burrell dives into a mouthwatering pizza; Kristen Kish warms up with a one-of-a-kind chicken pot pie in Austin, Texas.
